property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
11:00:50.364 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.hps.archdesign.HpsArchDesignApplicationTests]: HpsArchDesignApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 11:00:50.459 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.hps.archdesign.HpsArchDesignApplication for test class com.hps.archdesign.HpsArchDesignApplicationTests
